query: flash photograph harsh fluorescent shadow uneven lighting
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — flash + ambient mixed lighting, harsh uneven exposure

response.objective_caption: A symmetrical upward view from directly beneath a massive concrete highway overpass at night, showing two towering rectangular support pillars flanking a narrow vertical gap beneath the bridge deck. Warm amber light illuminates the underside of the concrete span and casts angular beams across the textured pillar surfaces, revealing the grid patterns of the formwork. Through the center gap, a deep indigo sky is visible, anchored by a single brilliant purple pinpoint light at the distant vanishing point. Sparse vegetation is visible at the base between the supports.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A monumental upward view from beneath a massive concrete overpass employs extreme perspective to render the infrastructure at an overwhelming, disorienting scale. Two towering support pillars flank a narrow gap beneath the bridge deck, their weathered surfaces displaying pronounced decay, water stains, and accumulated grime. Warm amber light rakes across the concrete textures while deep shadows and the immense looming mass of the structure create an atmosphere of oppressive unease. Sparse vegetation at the base underscores the raw entropy of the aged, neglected concrete.
